## How was this tested?

<!-- Pick what applies; add anything specific you did -->
- [ ] Loaded the extension unpacked and clicked through the affected feature
- [ ] Verified on at least one of the SMOKE_TEST.md portals
- [ ] No new red errors in the DevTools console
- [ ] Tested in an incognito window
- [ ] If translation/score/search-related: tested with the on-device AI engine
- [ ] If translation/score/search-related: tested with the Google Translate fallback (toggled in Settings)
- [ ] If touching cards/animations: verified the language picker popover still opens above everything

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title starts with `feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / `chore:` / `refactor:` / `test:`
- [ ] No new dependencies added (we have zero — keep it that way)
- [ ] No analytics, tracking, or telemetry introduced
- [ ] If this changes manifest permissions: justification updated in `submission/SUBMISSION.md`
- [ ] If this is user-facing: `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] If this affects the manifest version: bumped per the convention in `submission/SUBMISSION.md`
